title: Schedule-grounded daily guidance for patient user-001
starting_prompt: Hi Raksha, what should I be doing right now for my recovery today?
conversation_plan: Ask for immediate rehab guidance, then ask one short follow-up about today's plan. End after the assistant grounds the answer in the patient's schedule.
user_persona: Conversational neuro-rehab patient who wants simple guidance and asks practical follow-up questions.
end_when: The assistant has grounded its answer in the current or next schedule item.
